title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Kaskela Law Firm Announces Investigation of Reservoir Media, Inc. (NASDAQ: RSVR) and Encourages Long-Term Investors to Contact the Firm
author: Kaskela Law Firm
description: Kaskela Law Firm is investigating Reservoir Media, Inc. (NASDAQ: RSVR), Houlihan Lokey, Inc. (NYSE: HLI), and Kelly Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: KELYA) on behalf of investors. The investigations seek to determine whether the companies or their representatives violated securities laws or breached fiduciary duties in connection with recent corporate actions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is under investigation for potential violations of securities laws and breach of fiduciary duties, which raises concerns about corporate governance and investor protection.
Company is under investigation for potential violations of securities laws and breach of fiduciary duties, which raises concerns about corporate governance and investor protection.
Company is under investor investigation, indicating potential legal and governance issues that could impact shareholder value.

title: Houlihan Lokey (HLI) Q1 EPS Jumps 75%
author: Jesterai
description: Houlihan Lokey reported Q1 FY2026 earnings with non-GAAP EPS of $2.14, exceeding analyst expectations. All three advisory segments showed revenue growth, though overall revenue missed estimates. The company benefited from a remarkably low tax rate and continued expansion in key talent areas.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed financial performance with earnings beating expectations but revenue falling short. Positive growth in advisory segments offset by increased expenses and cautious management outlook.

title: Analyst Predicts Double-Digit Revenue Growth For Retail Brokers, Noting Weak M&A, ECM/DCM Volumes In Investment Banking Sector
author: Lekha Gupta
description: The analyst predicts double-digit revenue growth for retail brokers like Coinbase, Robinhood, and Interactive Brokers, driven by strong account acquisition and a supportive trading environment. However, the investment banking sector is expected to see a delayed cyclical recovery, with weak M&A and ECM/DCM volumes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The analyst expects Coinbase to benefit from robust account acquisition and a cyclically supportive retail trading environment, leading to double-digit revenue growth.
The analyst expects Robinhood to benefit from a strong trading environment, supporting its revenue growth.
The analyst expects Interactive Brokers to benefit from a strong trading environment, supporting its revenue growth.
The analyst sees potential upside for Evercore due to its exposure to Equity Capital Markets (ECM), which could benefit from a recovery in the investment banking sector.
The analyst expects Houlihan Lokey to experience through-the-cycle growth from ongoing momentum in Corporate Finance and benefits from restructuring and inorganic growth execution.

title: Lexitas CEO Nishat Mehta to Share Insights on Legal Innovation at ONE Houlihan Lokey Global Conference 2025
author: N/A
description: Lexitas CEO Nishat Mehta will be a featured speaker at the ONE Houlihan Lokey Global Conference 2025, where he will discuss the role of AI and technology in driving efficiency and enhancing service delivery in the legal services sector.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions the ONE Houlihan Lokey Global Conference 2025, which is described as a premier gathering for business leaders across industries, indicating Houlihan Lokey's prominence in the industry.

title: Solomon Partners Expands Financial Institutions Group with the Hiring of 3 Seasoned Bankers
author: Globe Newswire
description: Solomon Partners, a financial advisory firm, announced the expansion of its Financial Institutions Group with the hiring of three experienced professionals from Houlihan Lokey. The new hires will focus on advising clients in the mortgage services, insurance, and insurance services sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that the new hires previously worked at Houlihan Lokey, indicating a neutral sentiment as the company is not the focus of the news.
